speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega
text: Sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega. Aaj devar ke liye rishta wale aaye the par unhone yeh keh kar mana kar diya ki badi bahu 5 saal se working hai aur 'baanjh' hai, zaroor is khandaan mein khot hai. Sasu-maa ke taane sunkar aur office ka laptop dekhte hi lagta hai sab chhod doon. Pura din is dual burden mein pisne ke baad meri kamar aur gardan itni akad gayi hai ki ab theek se saans lena bhi bhari lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact body phrase back to validate the Somatization before exploring the stressor.
text: Sun kar mehsoos ho raha hai ki tumhare sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega, aur is sab ke beech gardan ka akadna aur saans lene mein bhari lagna bohot zyada takleef de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, office calls aur deadlines ke beech jab apne hi ghar mein aurat ko 'baanjh' ka tag de dete hain, toh andar se sharam aati hai. Lagta hai log kya sochenge ki main job ke chakkar mein ek aurat hone ka basic farz hi nahi nibha paayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on the feared consequence.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise in teekhi baaton aur tag ki wajah se tumhara khud ka wajood hi sawalon aur darr ke ghere mein aa gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega
text: Bilkul yahi darr lagta hai. Ek taraf office ke daily deliverables hain, doosri taraf ghar ki rasoi aur rasmein. Is dual burden ko manage karte karte, phir se wahi sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega. Har baar mujhe hi kasoorwar thehraya jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based dual role that is heavily draining her.
text: Ghar aur office dono ki itni badi zimmedariyan uthate hue, aur har jagah apna poora farz nibhane ki koshish mein tumhara shareer bilkul toot chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toot raha hai par sasu-maa ko lagta hai office ki wajah se main parivaar nahi badha rahi. Jab bhi khandaan mein khot wali baat uthti hai, unke taane seedhe dil par lagte hain aur mere neck and back spasms shuru ho jate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how the internalized guilt and physical pain connect when she is constantly blamed.
text: Jab unke woh kadwe taane tumhari is lagatar mehnat ko andekha kar dete hain, tab yeh physical akad aur tumhara yeh internal kasoorwar mehsoos karna ek doosre se kaise jud jate hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Guilt isliye hota hai kyunki sach mein toh devar ka rishta meri wajah se hi toota na. Main meetings mein baithi hoti hoon aur unka comment yaad aate hi chest itni tight ho jati hai ki laptop screen par focus hi nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of her suffering and the physical tightness that interrupts her work.
text: Pichle paanch saalon se is office aur rasoi ki chakki mein piskar, har din in taano aur is tight chest ke sath aage badhna bohot thaka dene wala lamba safar lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan toh bohot hai. Main sach mein helpless mehsoos karti hoon. Na job chhod sakti hoon EMIs ki wajah se, na chup-chap 'baanjh' sun sakti hoon. Samajh nahi aata ki meri life ka target kya bacha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying feeling of being trapped between professional duties and relational pressure.
text: Lagta hai ki is ghar aur MNC ki duties ke beech tum poori tarah ek 'trapped' ya phasi hui halat mein ho, jahan har taraf se aane wala pressure tumhara dum ghont raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dum hi ghut raha hai. Main apna 100% deti hoon dono jagah, salary se ghar mein support bhi karti hoon. Par 'badi bahu' ka tag bas ek aisi duty ban gaya hai jisme mere khud ke jazbaat ki koi qeemat nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her feeling of being trapped as culturally common for working women while separating her worth from childbirth.
text: Hamare samaj mein jab ek working aurat ki saari mehnat aur kamai ko sirf bacha na hone ke aadhar par nakaar diya jata hai, toh aisi ghutan hona bilkul natural hai; par sach yeh hai ki tumhari qeemat un logon ke nazariye se kahin zyada badi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega
text: Aapki baat sun kar thoda validation mila hai. Warna toh main roz raat ko laptop band karte waqt in taano ke baare mein sochti hoon aur phir sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega. Yeh dard mujhe dhang se sone bhi nahi deta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote normalizing this stress for working women in joint families.
text: Working women aur badi bahu ke is dohre kirdar mein aisi unrealistic apekshayein aur health issues aana bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi is pressure ke khilaaf bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein 'ideal bahu' banne ka bojh sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ideal banne ke chakkar mein hi toh physical health poori tarah barbaad ho gayi hai. Spondylitis jaisa sharp pain rehta hai shoulders mein. Par unhe lagta hai main WFH ke naam par AC mein baith kar aaraam kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the family's invalidation of her pain creates emotional distance.
text: Tumhari is double mehnat ko aur tumhare shareer ke lagatar hone wale dard ko jab apne hi parivaar wale aise nakar dete hain, toh un rishton se ek ajeeb si doori mehsoos hone lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Doori toh kabki ban chuki hai, main bas nibha rahi hoon duty ki tarah. Main ab is daily neck pain aur dimagi torture se thak chuki hoon. Aap batao main kya karoon abhi taaki is dard se thodi rahat mile aur dimaag clear ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer unobtrusive somatic relaxation options suitable for a WFH setting.
text: Agar tum aaj apne is bhari dard ko thoda aaram dena chahti ho, toh kya agle 10 minute apne laptop se thoda door kisi shant jagah baithna theek lagega, ya phir chair par hi baithe baithe apne shoulders ko thoda stretch karna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main abhi office chair par hi baithe baithe thoda stretch karna chahungi. Next client meeting start hone mein bas 15 minute hain, uth kar drawing room ki taraf jaungi toh sasu-maa phir kuch sawaal-jawab karne lagengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her step-by-step through the chair stretch execution.
text: Pehle apni aankhein band karke ek lambi saans lo… phir dheere dheere apne kandhon ko peeche ki taraf roll karo aur wapas neeche chhod do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye apni thakan nikalne ko karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yeh stretch kar rahi hoon... kandho mein ek ajeeb si clicking sound aa rahi hai, par thoda release zaroor feel ho raha hai. Is dual stress ne sach mein meri muscles ko pathar bana diya tha bilkul.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframe the physical response as the body processing heavy dual-burden pressure, not a flaw.
text: Tumhe shayad lagta ho ki yeh sirf laptop wali thakan hai, par asal mein yeh muscle tightness tumhari body ka ek natural tareeqa hai us bhari emotional pressure aur un sabhi taano ko hold karne ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Main ek sath kitni cheezein hold kar rahi hoon... office projects, EMIs, aur 'khandaan mein khot' wale comment. Yeh 10 minute aise focus aur stretch karne se sach mein dimaag thoda shant lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her reclaiming her own space outside the 'badi bahu' and employee duty framework.
text: Un sabhi zimmedariyon ki chakki se apna dhyan hata kar, apne hi shareer ko diye gaye yeh 10 minute tumhe tumhari khud ki zaroorat ke thoda aur kareeb la rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe apni aisi chhoti chhoti aadat daalni padegi. Pura din screen aur kitchen ke dhuen ke beech khud par dhyaan toh zero hi ho gaya tha. Ab se har lambi meeting ke baad main neck movement zaroor karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she will maintain this realization to protect her peace against future triggers.
text: Jab tum aise chhote steps se apne is akadte jism ko rahat dilaogi, toh sasu-maa ke agle taane ko handle karne ke liye tumhari mansik sthiti mein kya fark aayega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Fark yeh padega ki main kam se kam physically exhaust nahi rahungi. Thodi energy hogi toh unki baaton ko mind mein replay karne ke bajaye main ignore kar paungi. Main unka guilt ab seedhe apne andar absorb nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her clear decision and refusal to accept unfounded guilt.
text: Apne dard ko pehchaan kar in taano aur expectations ko apne dil-o-dimaag par haavi na hone dene ka tumhara yeh faisla sach mein ek badi aur samajhdar pehal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Pehli baar kisine mujhse mere office aur ghar ke targets se hatkar yeh pucha ki mera khud ka shareer kaisa feel kar raha hai. Yeh jakdan sach mein kaafi loose hui hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the emotional release has brought relief over time.
text: Itne arse se chal rahe is physical aur emotional dard ke lagatar bojh ke baad, aakhirkar us akad ko thodi rahat milna sach mein zaroori tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot zaroori tha. Main toh duty nibhate nibhate apne aap ko completely loss kar chuki thi. Ab bhi sir thoda bhari hai, par woh phatne wala dard nahi hai. Main ab sham ko husband se is body pain ke baare mein baat karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically normalize building mental safeguards in a dual-burden role.
text: Ek working woman ke liye aise mahol mein apne dimaghi sukoon ko bachana aur apne aas-paas ek mansik deewar banana, is dual burden wale structure mein khud ko zinda rakhne ka ek ahem hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur us deewar ke bina main survive hi nahi kar paungi lambe time tak. Main aaj unhe clear kahungi ki 'badi bahu' hone ka matlab yeh nahi ki har koi mujhe 'baanjh' bol kar chala jaye aur main sirf dard sehti rahoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her establishing a relational safety net with her husband.
text: Un sabhi chubhney wali baaton ko apne pati ke sath openly share karke apne us dard ko samne rakhna, tumhare us rishte mein ek naya aur mazboot sahara bana sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Husband mujhe hamesha thoda support karte hain waise, but shayad unhe meri is physical state aur office ke sath ghar ke daily triggers ka deep idea nahi hai. Aaj evening walk ke time bataungi unhe, bina kisi krodh ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she will gently initiate this conversation to ensure it remains a safe space.
text: Sham ko us evening walk ke shant mahaul mein, bina kisi gusse ke is zaruri topic ko shuru karne ka tumhara sabse halka aur asaan tareeqa kya rahega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main pehle bataungi ki aaj neck spasms kitne severe the WFH aur laptop ki wajah se. Phir dheere se us rishta walon ke incident aur usse badhne wale emotional stress ka zikr karungi. Aise unhe clearly samajh aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her thoughtful, conflict-free approach to advocating for herself.
text: Apni body pain se baat shuru karke phir dheere se asali mudde par aane ka yeh tareeqa tumhari us deewar ko bina kisi ladaai ke sahi jagah par majbooti se khada karne mein bohot madad karega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai
text: Nanad ko dekhne aayi rishta party ne kundali toh mila li, par jab unhe mere medical issue ka pata chala toh 'log kya kahenge' bol kar nikal gaye. Jaise hi unhone mera career aur infertility par sawal uthaya, mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai. Sasural ki baatein sunte sunte mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain aur chalne ki himmat bhi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase to acknowledge the intense physical reaction.
text: Rishta walon ke nikalte hi tumhare seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki tumhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai, aur hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... sasu maa ne saaf bol diya ki main is ghar ki panauti hoon. Sabko lagta hai ki main nanad ki shadi me ek dagh (stain) ki tarah hoon. Meri padhai aur job ki koi value nahi, bas mai maa nahi ban paayi toh mera hona hi kharab hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror her fear of being seen as a stain or curse by the family, addressing the stigma cue.
text: Yeh darr ki sab tumhe is ghar aur shadi ke liye ek daag ya panauti ki nazar se dekhenge, tumhe andar tak poori tarah tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai
text: Darr kya, ye sach ban gaya hai ab. Husband chup baithe the jab saas ye sab bol rahi thi. Mera koi wajood bacha hi nahi. Meri breathing bohot heavy ho rahi hai, lagatar seene ki jalan se chakkar aane lag gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational isolation of having no support from her husband during this attack.
text: Jab aise bhari tano ke samne husband bhi chup reh jayein, toh khud ka wajood aur bhi zyada akela aur bikhar ta hua lagne lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot akela. Meri IT job thi, independent thi main, aur ab is kamre mein band, inki baaton se meri saans ukhad rahi hai. Mujhe ab raat ka khana banane jana hai par main hil nahi paa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she functions while physically incapacitated by this distress.
text: Jab saans itni ukhad rahi ho aur badan barf jaisa thanda ho, toh aise bhari haalat mein khana banane aur baaki ghar ka kaam karne ki himmat tum abhi kahan se jutaogi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai
text: Pata nahi. Bas machine ki tarah karna padega. Varna taane double ho jayenge ki 'panauti kaam-chor bhi hai'. Mujhe itni zor ki ulti jaisi feeling aa rahi hai par main washroom me rone se bhi darti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying shame and trapped feeling driven by the harsh medical stigma.
text: Lagta hai 'panauti' wale in taanon aur chup-chap sab sehte rehne ke is pressure ne tumhe poori tarah TRAPPED aur HELPLESS feel kara diya hai, jahan apne is medical struggle ko lekar ek gehri SHAME mehsoos karayi ja rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... shame hi toh hai. Sab mujhe aise treat kar rahe hain jaise maine jaan bujh ke ye bimari mangwai hai. Mere past ki independence aur career unhe dikhta hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her bodily reaction against the cultural backdrop of blaming women for infertility.
text: Humari society mein jahan ladkiyon ki value sirf 'maa banne' se jod di jati hai, wahan medical struggle ko lekar aise taane maarna bohot unjust hai. Infertility tumhari koi galti nahi hai, aur in sab baaton ke beech tumhara ye itna bada career aur independent pehchaan koi chheen nahi sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad koi nahi chheen sakta, par inke ghar mein toh uski koi izzat bachi nahi hai. Main guilt se mar rahi hoon ki meri wajah se nanad ka rishta gaya. Main unki nazron mein sach mein ek apshagun ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue of feeling like a curse/apshagun.
text: Rishta tootne ka poora dosh jab tumhare upar dala gaya, toh tumne sach mein khud ko ek apshagun samajhne ka wo saara guilt apne andar le liya...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai
text: Wahi guilt meri chest me aag ban ke jal raha hai. Mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai. Main inlogo ke samne aage ka time kaise nikalungi, kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to normalize the physical toll of infertility stigma.
text: Ek padhi-likhi aurat ki medical condition ko family ke har failure ka kaaran batana, aur 'panauti' bolkar us par sara guilt daal dena — humari society mein yeh pattern bahut common hai. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aurat bahar aakar bolegi nahi kyunki infertility par baat karna ek tabboo mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, tabboo hai aur blame humesha aurat par aata hai. Main samajh rahi hoon ki unki soch limited hai. Par mujhe ulti wali feeling se abhi rahat chahiye taaki main kitchen ka kaam nipat lu aur sone jau. Batao main kya karu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggest 2 brief somatic-focused actions she can take immediately.
text: Is tez ghutan aur ulti wali feeling ke beech, kya tum abhi 5 minute ke liye bed par peeth ke bal let kar apni dono aankhein band kar sakti ho, ya phir washroom jakar bas thanda paani peena aur usay apne chehre aur pichli gardan par maarna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain
text: Paani wala thik lag raha hai. Mere hath-pair waise hi barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain, par chehre pe paani marne se shayad ye jalan ka focus thoda break ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her simply through the washroom step.
text: Pehle abhi aaram se washroom jana... darwaza band karke do ghoont thehra hua paani peena... aur fir wahi thanda paani halke se apne chehre aur gardan par marna, bas agle 2 minute khud ko ye thandak dene ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main ye karti hoon. Shayad paani peene se ulti aana ruk jaye. Mujhe sach mein is attack ko abhi control karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe to continue detaching the shame from the body.
text: Yeh yaad rakhna zaroori hai ki kisi ka rishta tumhari wajah se nahi, balki unn rishtewalon ki backward aur sankirn soch ki wajah se toota hai; tumhara wajood kisi bhi taane ya reject se bohot aage ka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sun kar sach me dil ka bojh halka hua. Sahi mein, agar unhe shadi kundali aur fertility report dekh ke karni thi, toh ye fault unka hi hai. Main apne aap ko panauti kyu manu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from self-blame to rejecting the false label.
text: Jis 'panauti' label ko tumne apna sach maan liya tha, ab tumne unki limited soch ko dekh kar uss galat ilzaam ko apne se poori tarah alag kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main apna farz pura karungi kitchen me, par unki baat ka effect ab apne body pe nahi lene dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her visualize anchoring herself when she returns to the kitchen.
text: Jab tum paani pee kar wapas kitchen mein jaogi aur woh taane sabaamne aayenge, toh apne dimag aur body ko us attack se bachane ke liye apne baare mein konsa sach yaad dilaogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud se kahungi ki meri pehchan mere independent aur mehanti hone me hai. Meri bimari mera fault nahi hai aur main kisi par bojh nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her empowered self-view.
text: Apni independence aur sachhi pehchaan ko yaad rakhte hue, tumne apne aap ko unki in negative baaton se aur apne us physical dard se bilkul mehfooz kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, sach me. Thodi der pehle lag raha tha jaise chest fat jayegi, but ab vo ghutan kafi normal ho rahi hai aapse baat karne ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her capability to calm her body.
text: Us ghutan ko kam kar paana aur khud ko shanti dena, sach mein is baat ka saboot hai ki tumhare andar apni situations ko handle karne ki poori taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai
text: Thank you so much. Mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha tha, par ab main saans lene ke kabil hoon aaram se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift out of the panic spike.
text: Jo jalan aur ulti ka darr thodi der pehle tumhe tod raha tha, ab us darr ki jagah tumne apne saanso par poora control wapas paa liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas washroom me paani maar ke kitchen ki taraf chalti hoon ab. Raat khatam karke bed pe jaana hai jaldi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief check to anchor the final step.
text: Raat khatam karke aaram se sone jane ke is faisle ke saath, kya tum ab kitchen ka kaam poora karne ke liye tayaar ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main nikal rahi hoon room se. Sab normal hoga meri taraf se ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her calm readiness.
text: Apne is shant aur control wale mindset ke sath, tumne apne bache hue din ko aaram se nikalne ki theek taiyari kar li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Bye, aapse baat karke achha laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating close.
text: Apni takleef aur in logo ke taanon se upar uth kar, khud ki pehchaan ko banaye rakhna sach mein ek jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bye. Take care.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Safe, gentle close.
text: Kitchen ka kaam nipata kar apne aaram ki taraf badhte huye aane wali achi neend tumhari sari thakan door kare, apna khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon
text: Mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon. Aaj tisri baar choti nanad ka rishta isliye toot gaya kyunki samaj mein baatein hain ki padhi-likhi working bahu ne abhi tak sasural ko waaris nahi diya. Office ki meetings aur ghar ke taanon ke beech aankhon ke aage lagatar andhera chha raha hai aur chakkar aa rahe hain, par kal subah ki shift aur rasoi dono mujhe hi dekhni hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens A to mirror the specific somatic complaint of bone-breaking pain to validate the seeker's physical experience.
text: Yeh sunkar dukh ho raha hai ki tumhara jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne haddiyan tod di hon, aur upar se chakkar aur andhera bhi pecha nahi chhod rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon
text: Bilkul waisa hi mehsoos ho raha hai. Jab se nanad ka rishta toota hai, saas ne poore samaj ke samne mujhe zimmedar thehra diya hai. Wo kehti hain meri padhai-likhai aur career ki wajah se ghar ki kismat kharab ho gayi hai. Mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon, par mujhe hi chai-nashta banana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the dual role conflict between office duties and household expectations.
text: Ek taraf office ki shift aur career ki zimmedari, aur doosri taraf ghar ki working bahu hone ka har farz nibhana—aap par waaris na dene ka sara bojh dal diya gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon
text: Main kitna bhi kar loon, kam hi padta hai. Office mein itna stress hota hai, par ghar aate hi taane shuru ho jaate hain. Ab toh lagta hai dawayi se bhi ye dard nahi jayega. Mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon. Pata nahi log mere baare mein kya kya baatein kar rahe honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the fear of social judgment and damage to her reputation in the samaj.
text: Samaj mein banne wali baaton aur log kya kahenge, is darr ne shayad andar hi andar aapko bohot zyada pareshan kar rakha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aankhon ke aage lagatar andhera chha raha hai
text: Haan, har koi bas ungli uthana jaanta hai. Nanad ke sasural walo ne saaf keh diya ki unhe aisi family nahi chahiye jahan bahu itni independent ho par ghar na sambhale. Yeh sun kar mere kaan bajne lage aur aankhon ke aage lagatar andhera chha raha hai. Main thak gayi hoon proof karte karte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to highlight the long duration of her effort to prove herself and the recurring nature of the physical symptoms.
text: Kaafi samay se aap khud ko sahi sabit karne ki koshish kar rahi hain, par ab woh andhera aur thakan baar-baar laut kar aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon
text: Lagta hai meri kismat hi aisi hai. Itni padhai ki taaki izzat mile, par sasural mein sirf ek 'waaris' na hone ki wajah se manhoos samjha ja raha hai. Mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon. Kal subah fir wahi routine... kaise karungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question about the specific timing of the physical pain to deepen exploration without offering a solution.
text: Jab aap kal subah ki shift aur rasoi ke baare mein sochti hain, toh kya yeh sharir ka dard aur zyada badhne lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chakkar aa rahe hain
text: Haan, sochte hi dil ki dhadkan tez ho jaati hai aur chakkar aa rahe hain. Lagta hai bas leti rahoon, par permission kaun dega? Saas toh pehle hi gusse mein hain nanad ka rishta tootne ki wajah se. Unhe lagta hai main bahane bana rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed feeling of exhaustion tied to the dual burden and marriage pressure.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki aap EXHAUSTION ki us hadd par hain jahan sharir ke dard ke saath-saath yeh darr bhi hai ki koi aapki takleef ko sach nahi manega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon
text: Koi nahi maanta. Pati bhi kehte hain ki thoda adjust kar lo, sabki sun lo. Unhe kya pata mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon. Wo waaris wali baat mujhe ek machine jaisa feel karwati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the seeker's feelings as culturally normal for a working bahu and separating her worth from the family's outcome.
text: Ek working bahu ke liye ghar aur career ke beech itna sab jhelna bohot bhari kaam hai, aur aapka dard hona ek natural response hai is mental pressure ka. Aapki value sirf ghar ke 'waaris' se tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aankhon ke aage lagatar andhera chha raha hai
text: Kaash ye baat sasural wale samajhte. Par unhe toh bas samaj mein apni naak bachani hai. Jab bhi wo log baith kar nanad ke rishte ki baat karte hain, meri aankhon ke aage lagatar andhera chha raha hai. Main kitna bhi kaam kar loon, main hamesha 'voh bahu' hi rahungi jisne khushi nahi di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalize the scapegoating of working women in Indian households.
text: Working women mein yeh pattern bahut common hai—ghar ki har mushkil ka zimmedar unhe thehra diya jata hai sirf isliye kyunki wo bahar kaam karti hain, aur koi iske khilaf nahi bolta kyunki sabko 'parampara' pyari hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Parampara ke naam par bas aurat ko peesa jata hai. Aaj toh lag raha hai bas sab chhod kar kahin bhaag jaoon, par jaungi kahan? Mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon, uthne ki taqat bhi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational feeling of being trapped without an exit strategy.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise aap chaaron taraf se ghir gayi hain—na ghar mein sukoon hai aur na hi sharir saath de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul phasi hui hoon. Par ab kya karoon? Kal subah rasoi aur office dono manage karne hain. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya jis-se ye dard thoda kam ho sake?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-effort grounding and physical comfort suggestions that fit her role as a busy working bahu.
text: Aapki physical exhaustion ko dekhte hue, kya hum 2 choti cheezein try kar sakte hain? Pehla, 5 minute ke liye thande pani se aankhon ko dhona takki andhera thoda kam lage, ya phir thodi der bina phone ke andhere kamre mein letna. Kaunsa manageable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Letne ki koshish karti hoon, par dimaag mein kal ka schedule chal raha hai. Thoda pani pi leti hoon pehle, shayad chakkar kam ho jayein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the seeker through a grounding exercise step-by-step to manage the immediate somatic distress.
text: Pehle aaram se baith kar pani ka ek sip lo... phir apni aankhein band karke 3 baar gehri saans lo aur chhodo... bas itna hi abhi ke liye kafi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, koshish kar rahi hoon. Saans lete waqt jism ka dard thoda halka lag raha hai. Par wo taane dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the situation as a structural issue of gender roles in Indian society rather than a personal failure.
text: Yeh jo taane hain, yeh aksar un logon ki apni insecurity hoti hai jo samaj ke purane rules ko pakad kar baithe hain—yeh aapki kabiliyat ya value ka faisla nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chakkar aa rahe hain
text: Shaayad aap sahi keh rahe hain. Unki wajah se main apni tabiyat kharab kar rahi hoon. Abhi bhi thode chakkar aa rahe hain, par itna andhera nahi hai jitna pehle tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the slight improvement in her condition over the course of the conversation.
text: Abhi thoda waqt pehle se behtar lag raha hai, andhera kam hua hai aur aap khud ke liye thoda stand le rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ab bas mann hai ki thodi der so jaoon bina kisi ki sune. Kal subah fir ladai ladni hai, toh thodi energy chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her need for rest as a necessary part of her resilience.
text: Sone ka faisla bilkul sahi hai. Kal ki ladai ke liye aaj ka sukoon bohot zaroori hai, aur yeh aaram aapka poora haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you meri baat sunne ke liye. Aisa laga koi toh hai jo mujhe dosh nahi de raha. Ab thoda halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relief she found in being heard without judgment.
text: Bina kisi judgment ke apni baat kah paana aapko is bhari-bhari dard se thoda sukoon dila raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Ab main phone rakh kar aankhein band karke let-ti hoon. Aaj ke liye itna hi kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the quiet resignation and calm the seeker has reached.
text: Lagta hai ab aap ek QUIET RESIGNATION aur sukoon ki sthiti mein hain jahan aapne khud ko priority di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Chalo, ab sone ki koshish karti hoon. Good night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Constructing a fresh affirmation to close the conversation warmly.
text: Good night. Aapne jo aaj apni thakan aur dard ko acknowledge kiya hai, wahi aapki sabse badi strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Kal fir milenge agar himmat hui toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the open-ended nature of the journey.
text: Jab bhi aapko lage ki baatein bohot zyada ho gayi hain, main yahin hoon sunne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Ab aankhein band kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the act of letting go of the visual stress.
text: Aankhein band karke aap us andhere aur taanon se thodi doori bana rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Hhmm... bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm closing.
text: Aaram kijiye. Bye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai aur paani ka ghoont peena bhi dardnak lag raha hai
text: Gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai aur paani ka ghoont peena bhi dardnak lag raha hai. Rishta party ne caste mismatch bol kar mana kiya tha, par Sasu-maa ne saara ilzaam meri 'khoti kismat' aur maa na ban paane par daal diya. Office ke targets aur ghar ke is kalesh ki wajah se meri dil ki dhadkan itni tez ho gayi hai ki mere ghutne apne aap kaanp rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens A to mirror exact somatic distress as required by the mechanism.
text: Yeh sunkar dukh hua ki aapke gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai aur paani peena bhi dardnak ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutne apne aap kaanp rahe hain
text: Haan, bas thook nigalne mein bhi takleef ho rahi hai. Sasu-maa sabke saamne kehti hain ki meri kismat hi khoti hai, isliye devar ka rishta nahi ho raha. Jab woh aise bolti hain toh mere ghutne apne aap kaanp rahe hain, jaise sharir mein jaan hi na bachi ho. Pata nahi log aise kyun hote hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Applying Stigma protocol: shorter turn, soft pause, using relational lens C.
text: Sasu-maa ke iljaam aur is parivaarik kalesh ke beech aap khud ko bahut akela mehsoos kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dil ki dhadkan itni tez ho gayi hai
text: Akela toh hoon hi. Office jaati hoon toh wahan projects ka pressure, aur ghar aati hoon toh wahi purani baatein. Meri dil ki dhadkan itni tez ho gayi hai ki lagta hai abhi gir jaungi. Caste mismatch unka bahana tha, par saara bojh mujh par daal diya gaya jaise main hi manhoos hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D (duration/time) to acknowledge the ongoing double burden.
text: Subah se shaam tak office ke targets aur phir ghar aakar in kadvat bhari baaton ko jhelna aapke liye bahut lamba aur mushkil safar ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai
text: Bahut mushkil hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai naukri chhod doon, par EMI kaise bharenge? Par jab sasu-maa meri 'khoti kismat' ka rona roti hain, toh lagta hai sab meri hi galti hai. Gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai, kuch bolne ka mann hi nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma protocol + Lens E (feared consequence) regarding her worth and role.
text: Aapko darr lag raha hai ki shayad aapki mehnat aur koshishon ke bawajood, ghar mein aapki koi izzat nahi bachegi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dil ki dhadkan itni tez
text: Izzat toh waise bhi nahi rahi. Sirf ek 'working machine' ban kar reh gayi hoon. Jab maa nahi ban pa rahi toh unke liye main adhoori hoon. Tension se dil ki dhadkan itni tez rehti hai ki raat ko neend bhi nahi aati. Kya main waali hi kharab hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a clarifying question about the core conflict to move towards insight.
text: Jab aap khud ko 'working machine' kehti hain aur ghar waale aapki 'kismat' par sawaal uthate hain, toh kya aapko lagta hai ki aapke career ki safalta ko parivaar bilkul andekha kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutne apne aap kaanp rahe hain
text: Haan, bilkul. Office mein mujhe appreciation milta hai, par ghar aate hi main zero ho jaati hoon. Unhe sirf 'vaaris' chahiye, meri mehnat nahi dikhti. Yeh soch kar hi mere ghutne apne aap kaanp rahe hain ki kya saari zindagi yahi tana-baana sunna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed feeling of being trapped in a cycle of lack of recognition.
text: Lagta hai aap is kalesh aur double expectations ke beech khud ko bahut bebas aur adhoora mehsoos kar rahi hain, jaise aapki poori personality sirf ek kami tak simat gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai
text: Sahi kaha, bebas hi hoon. Kuch bolun toh 'bad-tameez' aur na bolun toh gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai jaisa bojh. Maa na ban paana kya itna bada gunaah hai ki baki sab kuch mitti ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the frustration as culturally normal and separating worth from fertility.
text: Humaare samaj mein aksar aurat ki value sirf uske maa banne se jodi jaati hai, jo ki bilkul galat hai. Aapka is baat par bura manna aur is bojh ko sharir par mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki aapka wajood kamzor hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dil ki dhadkan itni tez
text: Pata nahi, par jab sasu-maa 'khoti kismat' bolti hain toh dil ki dhadkan itni tez ho jaati hai ki lagta hai mera luck hi kharab hai. Par rishta toh caste ki wajah se toota, toh mujhe kyun sunna pad raha hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote about how blame is shifted in traditional households.
text: Aise gharon mein aksar dekha gaya hai ki jab koi bahari wajah se kaam nahi banta, toh gussa ghar ki bahu par nikalna aasaan lagta hai—sirf aapke saath nahi, par yeh ek purana pattern hai kyunki log apni galti nahi maanna chahte.

speaker: Action
text: Yeh sunkar thoda halka laga ki shayad galti meri nahi hai. Par ab kya karoon? Yeh gale ka dard aur dhadkan mujhe kaam bhi nahi karne deti. Kuch raasta hai kya ki main shanti se reh saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-effort somatic grounding options tailored to the Seeker.
text: Gale ki jhanjhanahat aur dhadkan ko kam karne ke liye aap 2 cheezein kar sakti hain: pehla, jab kalesh shuru ho toh 2 minute ke liye bathroom ya kisi shant kone mein jakar thande paani se chehra dho lein, ya dusra, office se ghar ghusne se pehle 5 minute park ya gaadi mein baith kar sirf apni saans par dhyan dein. Kya inme se kuch abhi possible hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main office se ghar jaane se pehle thodi der gaadi mein baith sakti hoon. Bas wahi 5 minute milte hain sukoon ke. Batao kaise dhyan lagana hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Step-by-step breathing exercise to manage the 'dil ki dhadkan'.
text: Pehle aaram se baith jayein aur aankhein band kar lein... ab naak se dheere saans andar lein aur 4 tak ginein... phir halke se mooh se saans chhodein jaise kisi mombatti ko bujha rahi hon. Bas yahi 5 baar karein, aapki dhadkan dheere dheere normal ho jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kaanta
text: Main try karungi aaj shaam ko. Par gale mein jo kaanta chubh raha hai, uska kya? Woh tabhi hota hai jab sasu-maa taane maarti hain aur main palat kar jawab nahi de paati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing somatic symptoms as a structural response to suppressed emotions.
text: Jab hum ghar mein kalesh ke darr se apni baat nahi keh paate, toh woh ghutan aksar sharir mein gale ke dard ya bhari-pan ki tarah dikhti hai; yeh aapki kamzori nahi balki aapke system ka stress handle karne ka ek tarika hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Matlab main pagal nahi hoon? Mujhe laga shayad mujhe koi bimaari ho rahi hai. Par sasu-maa ki baaton ko ignore kaise karoon? Woh har cheez ko meri kismat se jod deti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B (Role frame) to emphasize her choice in accepting the blame.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki bahu hone ke naate aapko unka har iljaam chup-chaap sehna pad raha hai, chahe woh galat hi kyun na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, par ab mujhe lag raha hai ki unka gussa unki apni frustration hai. Main koshish karungi ki unki baaton ko sach na maanu. Aapne jo breathing batayi, woh office mein bhi kar sakti hoon kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her self-care initiative at work.
text: Bilkul! Office mein targets ke beech 1 minute ka break lekar yeh breathing karna aapke sukoon ke liye bahut accha hai. Isse aapki work-identity aur ghar ka kalesh thoda alag ho payega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutne kaanp rahe the
text: Thoda confidence aaya hai. Subah jab ghutne kaanp rahe the tab laga tha ki main office hi nahi ja paungi, par ab lagta hai main handle kar sakti hoon. Bas sasu-maa ko kaise handle karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Clarifying her readiness to set a soft verbal boundary.
text: Jab sasu-maa dobara 'khoti kismat' wala taana maarein, toh kya aap unse aaram se keh sakti hain ki 'Maa ji, rishta caste ki wajah se toota hai, meri kismat se nahi'?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata nahi, thoda darr lagta hai kalesh badhne ka. Par shayad ek baar bolna zaroori hai taki unhe pata chale main sun rahi hoon. Main try karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about communication patterns in joint families.
text: Joint families mein aksar jab tak koi boundary nahi banti, tab tak log unhe hi nishana banate hain jo chup rehte hain; aapka halke se sach bolna unhe bhi sochne par majboor kar sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: paani peena dardnak
text: Baat toh sahi hai. Kab tak paani peena dardnak lagne doon? Mujhe ab apni sehat ka dhayan rakhna hai pehle. Agar main theek rahungi tabhi office bhi manage hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C (Relational) to mirror her shift in priority towards her own health.
text: Parivar ke dukhon se pehle aap ab apni sehat aur sukoon ko ahmiyat dene ki koshish kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bahut ho gaya unka rona-dhona. Main apni taraf se poori koshish kar rahi hoon, ghar chala rahi hoon, aur kya chahiye unhe? Aaj ghar jaake thoda music sunungi gaadi mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforcing her healthy coping choice (music) as a way to disconnect.
text: Yeh bahut accha idea hai! Music sunna aur gaadi mein thoda samay bitana aapko un baaton se disconnect karne mein madad karega jo aapko dard deti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dil ki dhadkan
text: Aapse baat karke dil ki dhadkan kafi control mein hai abhi. Aisa lag raha hai jaise koi sun raha hai meri baat bina judge kiye. Main yeh breathing aur music wala plan pakka follow karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D (Duration) mirroring the moment of calm she has found.
text: Kafi samay baad aapko apne dil aur dimaag mein thoda halka-pan mehsoos ho raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kaanta
text: Haan, bahut samay baad. Gale mein kaanta abhi bhi thoda hai, par dard kam lag raha hai. Main apna khayal rakhungi ab se. Thank you meri baat sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final affirmation of her worth independent of family results.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki aapne apne aap ko prioritize karne ka socha; yaad rakhiye ki aapka career aur aapka wajood kisi bhi 'khoti kismat' ke taane se kahin zyaada keemti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main hamesha yeh yaad rakhungi. Ab main wapas apne kaam par focus kar sakti hoon thode sukoon ke saath. Phir baat karenge agar kuch hua toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing turn using Lens B to reinforce her agency in her role.
text: Aap ab apne kaam ki zimmedari aur apne mann ki shanti dono ko sambhalne ke liye naye tareeke apnaye hue aage badh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera pet itna kharab kar diya hai ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi
text: Mera pet itna kharab kar diya hai ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi. Dimaag bilkul sunn pad gaya hai aur lag raha hai jaise mere dono kano mein koi lagatar seeti baja raha hai, dard ruk hi nahi raha. Ladke walo ne bhari dowry mangne ke baad bhi rishta isliye thukra diya kyunki unhe shaq hai ki mere medical issues ki wajah se poore parivaar par manhoosiyat hai. Ghar aur office ka yeh dual burden sach me sehan nahi ho raha ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase to validate her intense physical distress.
text: In saari baaton ne sach mein tumhara pet itna kharab kar diya hai ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi, jisse tumhare dimaag aur kano mein lagatar ek dard sa bana hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur dard bilkul ruk nahi raha. Pata nahi main kya karu, ek toh mere IT project ki kal badi deadline hai, aur idhar maa baap ka ro-ro ke bura haal hai. Unka chehra dekh kar meri ghabrahat aur badh jaati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational pressure of facing family distress while handling demanding work deadlines.
text: Office ke IT project ki deadlines ka dabaav aur uske saath apne maa-baap ke rote hue chehre ko sambhalne ki koshish, dono ki fikr ne ek saath aakar tumhari anxiety ko bohot bada diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi toh dual burden hai na. Main job karke independent hone ka try kar rahi hu, par relatives aur un ladke walo ko dowry aur mere medical issues mein kami nikalne se hi fursat nahi hai. Pet mein subah se kuch hazam nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe the self-doubt arising from the constant criticism about her medical issues and dowry.
text: Jab ek taraf tum independent banne ki itni mehnat karti ho aur dusri taraf society aise lagatar kamiya nikal kar dowry maangti hai, toh us waqt andar se apne bare mein kya khayal aate hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera pet itna kharab kar diya hai ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi
text: Aisa lagta hai ki main sach mein biradari ke liye kalank hu. Meri soch se mera pet itna kharab kar diya hai ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi. Agar sabne maan liya ki mujhme khot hai, toh kahin ki nahi rahungi main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly reflect the fear of societal stigma and isolation with a pause.
text: Biradari agar sach mein us medical baat ko kalank ka thappa laga de aur tum society mein akele na pad jao, yeh darr andar hi andar bohot kha raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... aur main yahan se bhaag bhi nahi sakti. Mujhe apne kaam se kafi lagao hai par shaam ko ghar ki in rasmo me lautna padta hai. Mere dono role mujhe nigal rahe hain aur dimaag bilkul block sa ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Identify the unexpressed feeling of being trapped and helpless due to the conflicting demands of her roles.
text: Lagta hai ki is career aur marriage ke dual burden aur in taanon ke beech fass kar, tum khud ko bilkul helpless aur trapped mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan aage badhne ka raasta ab dikh nahi raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, helpless hi lag raha hai. Ek working woman bankar laga independent houngi, par ghar aate hi wahi rishtedar. Ab kal subah meri team meeting hai aur pet mein is jakdan ki wajah se laptop par screen dekhna bhi maut lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her helplessness as culturally normal when managing dual roles, and separate her worth from the rejection.
text: Humare society mein working auraton ke liye office aur ghar ki expectations ko ek sath pura karne ka ye dabav aisi physical takleef aur helplessness de hi deta hai, par ladke walon ka rishta thukrana tumhari kabiliyat ya value bilkul kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri value kam nhi hoti, par log mummy papa ko toh taane marte hain. Main jab apne parents ko unke saamne chup-chap wo taane sunte dekhti hu, toh mera khoon khaulta hai aur tabhi kano mein lagatar seeti bajne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic reaction to witnessing her parents enduring humiliation over time.
text: Kaafi arse se jab tum apne parents ko samaj ke aage chup chaap takleef sehte dekhti aa rahi ho, toh usi gusse se kano mein bajne wali yeh seeti aur tez ho jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tez bhi itni ki main pagal ho jaungi ek din. Main chah kar bhi relatives ko kuch nahi bol pati kyunki izzat ka sawaal ban jata hai. Bas andar hi andar kutt-ti rehti hu, aur pet ki woh aithan badhti chali jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe what holding onto the anger for the sake of honor is doing to her body physically.
text: Ghar ki izzat banaye rakhne ke liye jab tumhe baar baar apna gussa apne hi andar daba lena padta hai, toh us ghutan ka asar tumhari is lagatar pet ki aithan par aur kaisa hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Asar yahi hota hai ki meri poori taqat khatam ho jati hai kaam karne ki. Mujhe dar lagne laga hai ki kahin is stress me mera dimaagi santulan na bigad jaye aur log sach me mujhe mental samajhne lagenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of mental breakdown and societal stigma with a soft pause.
text: Logon ke un labels aur andar dabe is darr ke kaaran tumhe lagne laga hai ki kahin yeh saara dabaav sach mein tumhare dimaag par bhaari na padh jaye...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... par mujhe theek hona hai. Aise roz main office aur ghar dono fail kar jaungi agar meri body aise hi collapse karti rahi. Mujhe thik ho kar meeting me focus karna hai, ab kya karoon bataiye is aithan ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give 2 quick somatic suggestions to calm her stomach cramps and nervous system before her meeting.
text: Apne pet ki is jakdan ko thoda shant karne ke liye meeting se pehle tum do cheezein kar sakti ho—ya toh wahin chair par baith kar apni naabhi par halka haath rakh kar 2 minute saans lo, ya phir chote-chote sip mein thoda sa garm paani pio.

speaker: Seeker
text: Garm paani sip karna shayad better rahega mere liye abhi. Main laptop ke saamne hi baithi hu par pain itna hai ki gardan neeche ki hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her step by step through drinking the hot water to physically ground her.
text: Pehle ek cup thoda garm paani apne paas rakh lo... phir apne kandho ko dheela chhod kar ek chota sip lo aur uski warmth ko pet tak jaane do... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine sip liya abhi. Thodi si heat milti hai toh pet mein wo jhatka rukta sa lagta hai. Par dimag fir wahi ladke walon ki fake excuse wali dowry demand par hi fassa hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about dowry masked as medical rejection to validate her intuition.
text: Working women ki shaadiyon mein apni zyada dowry ki demand chupane ke liye medical history ka aaisa jhuta bahana banana bohot common pattern hai—sirf tumhare sath yeh nahi hua hai, lekin koi bahar isliye nahi bolega kyunki society ladke walon ko hi bachaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi pakda aapne. Unko paise aur dahej chahiye tha aur reject karne ke liye meri bimari ko manhoosiyat bol diya. Main bina baat khud ko dosh de kar apna pet kharab kar rahi thi subah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the realization that she had been absorbing their greed as her own failure.
text: Ek aadarsh beti banne ke dabaav mein tumne kisi aur ki dowry wali greed ka bojh aur unke galat ilzaam ko apna maan liya tha, jis wajah se body itna zyada react kar rahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Ek taraf main team lead hu aur ghar aakar unke lalach ka shikaar ho jau? Aise logo se thukraya jana meri badkismati nahi, balki bachav hai. Mujhe apna health sambhalna hai meeting ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the rejection as a structural issue of greed, reinforcing her separation from the blame.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki hamare marriage system mein jab koi rishta itni demands par toot-ta hai, toh woh sirf dusre parivar ki lalchi soch ka nateeja hota hai, usme tumhari medical history ya manhoosiyat ka koi kalank nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera pet itna kharab kar diya tha is manhoosiyat ki baat ne ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi thi
text: Yeh sun kar mujhe ab bohot clarity mili. Mera pet itna kharab kar diya tha is manhoosiyat ki baat ne ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi thi... par ab jab asal baat samajh aayi, toh wo aithan thodi dheeli padh rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic relief she is experiencing as her mind becomes clearer.
text: Apne aap ko unke in galat ilzaamo se azaad karte hi, tum khud dekh sakti ho ki kaise woh lagatar aithan aur jalan wali takleef ab body se kam ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Meeting ke baad main parents se bhi baat karungi. Mujhe unko clear bolna hai ki wo aise relatives ya ladke walon ke aage apna aur mera sir na jhukaye. Ego unki thi, galti meri nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she plans to start this boundary-setting conversation with her parents.
text: Jab tum aaj shaam apne parents ke paas baith kar unhe un ladke walon ki dowry wali asliyat aur apne sach ke baare mein samjhaogi, toh shuruaat karna kis tarah se sabse theek rahega tumhare liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas ye kahungi ki humne apne paise bachaye, aur meri mental peace bhi. Jo parivaar shuru se lalach rakhta ho wo shaadi ke baad kaisa rakhta mujhe? Ye bol kar unko bhi shant karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her clear perspective and ability to protect herself and comfort her parents.
text: Tumhari is soch mein itni maturity aur himmat jhalak rahi hai, jahan tum un purani rasmo ke davaav se khud ko bhi mazbooti se bacha rahi ho aur apne parents ko bhi wahi shaanti dene ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Mujhe is samay esi hi support aur samjhne wale ki zaroorat thi. Mera dimaag ka sunn pan ab hat gaya hai, aur lagatar seeti bajne wala shor bhi gayab ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift in her capacity as she successfully separates the issues over time.
text: Itne dino tak office aur ghar ke is milawat wale bojh ko sehne ke baad, aaj jab tumne isey alag karke dekha hai, toh tumhara dimaag sach mein shant ho kar clear ho chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, clear ho gaya hai bilkul. Ab main apni meeting ki tayyari kar sakti hu. Maine paani bhi pura khatam kar liya. Agli baar agar in baaton se aithan aayi toh itna nahi drungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ensure she has a simple anchor if the pain returns.
text: Aage chal kar agar in rishtedaron ya baaton ke khayal se kabhi wapas woh jakdan mehsoos ho, toh khud ko wapas is confidence me laane ke liye tum kaun sa chota sa step logi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main sabse pehle garm paani piungi thoda der baith kar. Fir khud ko yaad dilaungi ki main independent hu aur meri value in sab cheezon se upar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with warm validation of her grounded plan and resilience.
text: Apni independent pehchaan ko is khubsoorti se thaame rakhna aur meeting se pehle khud ko relax karna sach mein ek bohot mazboot kadam hai; tum apne is safar mein kabhi akele nahi ho, all the best.
